name: Pricing card
structure: name, desc, price block, feature ul, CTA
visual: Tier card: name, description, price block over a hairline, feature ul with checks, CTA; the recommended tier gets a ring/tint or elevation.
states: Recommended elevated; hover lift; calculator can re-highlight live.
animation: Card rise + fade; recommended tier holds a persistent glow/scale; CTA hover per button spec.

designLanguage.soft: Rounded, vibrant recommended ring, pill CTA.
